How to Measure: To calculate, sum the total response time for a given timeframe and divide by the number of tickets for that same timeframe
To calculate, take the total number of issues resolved on first contact and divide by the total number of issues received.
Sum the number of opened and closed tickets each day. Subtract for the difference.
To calculate, take the number of tickets that meet the SLA and divide by the total number of tickets. Multiply by 100 to reach percentage format.

KPI: Response Time to Client Requests or Incidents
How to Measure: Response Time = Time of Response Initiation - Time of Request Submission/Incident Report

KPI: Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR) for Client Issues
How to Measure: MTTR = Total Resolution Time / Number of Resolved Issues
SLA Compliance (%) = (Number of SLA-compliant Incidents / Total Number of Incidents) x 100
Resource Utilization Rate (%) = (Total Billable Hours / Total Available Working Hours) x 100
